cve_description: In Symfony before versions 5.0.5 and 4.4.5, some properties of the Exception were not properly escaped when the `ErrorHandler` rendered it stacktrace. In addition, the stacktrace were displayed even in a non-debug configuration. The ErrorHandler now escape alls properties of the exception, and the stacktrace is only display in debug configuration. This issue is patched in symfony/http-foundation versions 4.4.5 and 5.0.5

added: throw new Exception(__('File not uploaded correctly'));
// check if the file is a valid x509 certificate

cve_description: MISP 2.4.172 mishandles different certificate file extensions in server sync. An attacker can obtain sensitive information because of the nature of the error messages.
MISP 2.4.172 mishandles different certificate file extensions in server sync. An attacker can obtain sensitive information because of the nature of the error messages.
